title: Tender Pilaf with Russian Potatoes
description: A hearty and flavorful dish that combines the tender meat of pilaf with the richness of Russian potatoes. This recipe is perfect for a comforting meal.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add the diced potatoes and cook until they start to brown, about 5 minutes.
Add the pilaf and cooked tender to the pan, stirring to combine.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Continue cooking for another 5-7 minutes, or until the mixture is heated through.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
